headline: Verizon and 4 Other Stocks With 5% Yields—and Market-Beating Returns
summary: It isn’t easy to find attractive dividend yields right now, and it’s even harder to find high-yielding stocks that don’t look like yield traps.  The S&P 500 is up a solid 8.7%, but that growth, along with the popularity of dividend-averse tech stocks, has pushed the yield on the  close to 1%—near record lows.

headline: Baird Raises its Price Target on Healthpeak Properties (DOC)
summary: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE:DOC) is one of the 10 Fastest Growing S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On May 13, 2026, Baird analyst Wesley Golladay raised the firm’s price target on Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE:DOC) to $21 from $19 while maintaining an Outperform rating on the shares. headline: Buried Treasures:  5 Undervalued High-Yield REITs With Strong Balance Sheets
summary: REITs present attractive value, thanks in part to a shortage of new supply and relative immunity to AI disruption, and are outperforming the S&P YTD. Read our list of investment picks here.
